title: Shawshank Redemption
description: A wrongfully convicted banker forms a close friendship with a hardened convict over a quarter century while retaining his humanity through simple acts of compassion.

title: The Godfather
imageUrl: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son

title: The Dark Knight
status: Batman is a dark vigilante who protects Gotham City at night using intelligence strength and advanced technology he is the secret identity of Bruce Wayne a wealthy man driven by the loss of his parents he wears a black suit with a cape and cowl to strike fear into criminals and operates from the shadows relying on skill rather than superpowers
